items.title: BEST GAME EVER
items.summary: Although the art reminds me of Reverse 1999, the storyline is amazing and the world building makes me want to explore more of it. It’s very easy to grind and level up the characters (not to mention pull for them), and I like how it’s easy to continue the storyline without having to max out or boost

items.summary: 4.5 hours in, pretty fun game! Although coming from Limbus and Reverse1999 as well as path to nowhere, the gacha system threw me off.
